caption: A man with dark hair, wearing a light blue button-down shirt and a black gaming headset with a microphone, is positioned against a plain, light-colored wall. In the first frame, he gestures with both hands, pointing outward with his index fingers. As the sequence progresses, he continues to speak and move his hands, shifting his gestures to emphasize his points. In the third frame, he brings his right hand closer to his chest in a chopping motion, while in the final frame, his hands drop lower, and he continues talking. The text "Ashish Raichur" appears in the bottom left corner of each scene. The lighting is consistent throughout, and the man remains the sole focus of the shot, with no other people or objects visible except for the headset he is wearing.
